notes: Installing the plugin installs capabilities; schedules are HOST-level — they live on the user's machine, not in the package. Until now that meant a fresh install had all the machinery and none of the automation. Closed, by owner direction, and closed for good: - The automation registry (server/automations.json, exposed via the new list_automations tool): the canonical list of every scheduled job OTS ships — id, suggested cron + human cadence, prerequisites, heavy-job heads-ups, a FULLY SELF-CONTAINED portable prompt, placeholder contracts, and a CLI/cron alternative for headless setups. Curren
